output_preview:

/app/test.sh:# Test 2: Filter by min_rating=5 should return only 5-star products
/app/test.sh:count2=$(curl -s "http://localhost:3000/products?min_rating=5" | node -e "
/app/test.sh:    echo "FAIL: min_rating=5 should return 4 products, got $count

final_test_output:
